subcodes.first_line: The Book of God proclaimeth throughout the world that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Bestower. He hath appeared in truth and hath made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق فی العالم انه لا اله الا هو العزیز الوهاب انه ظهر بالحق و اظهر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @suffering and imprisonment, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
